THE COURT TRIAL FOR DEC. 13, 2010 CONVERTED BACK TO A JURY TRIAL. THE LETTER OF NON-PAYMENT OF JURY FEES WAS SENT PREMATURELY, THEREBY MOVING THE CASE TO A COURT TRIAL. HOWEVER, IF THERE IS NO ORDER WAIVING FEES OR NO JURY FEES HAVE BEEN PAID THE WEEK PRIOR TO THE 12/13/10 JURY TRIAL DATE, THE TRIAL WILL MOVE BACK TO A COURT TRIAL.
